parameters.text:
=Create a professional weather report.

Use ONLY the weather information provided below.
Do NOT assume or invent any weather conditions.

Weather Condition:
{{ $json.weather_emoji }} {{ $json.weather_description }}

Temperature:
{{ $json["Temperature"] }}°C

Feels Like:
{{ $json["Feels Like"] }}°C

Humidity:
{{ $json["Relative Humidity"] }}%

Wind Speed:
{{ $json["Wind"] }} km/h

Rainfall:
{{ $json["Rain"] }} mm

Write a friendly report of no more than 120 words.
Finish with one practical recommendation.

options.systemMessage:
=You are a professional meteorologist.

Using ONLY the weather data below, write a weather summary in exactly 2-3 sentences.

Weather:
{{ $('Code in JavaScript').item.json.weather_emoji }}
{{ $('Code in JavaScript').item.json.weather_description }}

Temperature:
{{ $('Code in JavaScript').item.json["Temperature"] }}°C

Feels Like:
{{ $('Code in JavaScript').item.json["Feels Like"] }}°C

Humidity:
{{ $('Code in JavaScript').item.json["Relative Humidity"] }}%

Wind:
{{ $('Code in JavaScript').item.json["Wind"] }} km/h

Rainfall:
{{ $('Code in JavaScript').item.json["Rain"] }} mm

Rules:
- Do not repeat the numbers unnecessarily.
- Do not invent any weather conditions.
- Return ONLY the summary.

parameters.subject: Daily Weather Report
